changelog: NEW — APP MODE (Lite / Pro). Same APK, two completely separate UI trees. Pro is what you've always had — cinematic backgrounds, animated heroes, rich detail screens. Lite is a brand-new flat UI built for older Android TVs: no animations, no gradients, no Ken Burns hero, no glow halos.

FIRST-LAUNCH AUTO-DETECT — On first cold start the app reads the device's RAM (ActivityManager.getMemoryClass), CPU cores, and manufacturer to recommend Lite or Pro. The recommendation is SOFT: a centered modal pops up, the recommended option is highlighted, but the user can still pick either.
TOP-CORNER LITE BADGE — When Lite is active a small green LITE pill is pinned to the top-right corner so users always know which mode they're in.
LITE TABS — Home / Live TV / Movies / Series / Sports / Search / Settings. Same data layer (Xtream / TheSportsDB / TMDB) so Pro users can switch any time without re-login.
LITE SPORTS — Static text-only matchup rows (NHL · Maple Leafs @ Rangers · LIVE · 3-2 · SPORTSNET ONE) instead of the cinematic scoreboard cards. Same backend, no Ken Burns, no auto-cycling.
TOGGLE ANY TIME — Pro Settings → APP MODE → Switch to Lite. Lite Settings → Switch to Pro. Instant — no relaunch.
ZERO RISK to Pro: Lite UI lives in a brand-new package com.hushtv.tv.ui.lite.* — physically separated from com.hushtv.tv.ui.screens.*. Editing a Lite file CANNOT affect Pro behaviour by construction.
